raw.problem: Mine tailings and red mud are stored as dead liability.
raw.opportunity_size: 200Mt/yr of red mud globally; India holds ~60Mt.
raw.why_now: Circular-material mandates push builders to seek substitutes.
raw.proof_of_work: Bricks from 70% red mud pass load tests.
raw.success_scenario: If green-building codes spread, offtake is large.

structured.tagline: Turning red mud and mine tailings into green building materials.
structured.problem: Mine tailings and red mud are stored as dead liability.
structured.opportunity_size: 200Mt/yr of red mud globally; India holds ~60Mt.
structured.differentiator: Ceramics researchers ex-NCL formulated bricks with 70% red mud passing load tests.
structured.solution: Built prototype bricks from 70% red mud passing load tests.
